Description: The AMS1117 is a family of three-terminal, positive, low dropout linear voltage regulators capable of delivering up to 1A of output current. It is available in both adjustable and fixed output voltage versions (1.5V, 1.8V, 2.5V, 2.85V, 3.3V, 5.0V). Key features include a low dropout voltage (guaranteed max 1.3V at 1A, operating down to 1V differential), on-chip trimming for reference voltage accuracy, and built-in current limiting. It is designed for applications such as post-regulation for switching supplies, power management in portable devices, and as a general-purpose voltage regulator, and is offered in SOT-223, TO-252 (DPAK), and 8L SOIC packages.

Functions.FunctionDescription: For fixed-voltage versions, this pin is ground. For the adjustable version, this pin connects to the feedback resistor divider to set the output voltage.
Regulated output voltage. Must be connected to a capacitor for stability.
Unregulated input voltage supply. Must be connected to a capacitor.
